onboarding.question: Define the retry behavior when the AI is unavailable during logged-out exploration — whether the user must resend the exact last message or can send any new message to trigger a retry attempt.
onboarding.recommendations:
[1]. My recommendation: When the AI is unavailable during logged-out exploration, the user can send any new message to trigger a retry attempt — they are not required to resend the exact last message; if the AI remains unavailable, the same inline error reappears and the user can attempt again with another message.

→ Rationale: Allowing any new message respects user autonomy and prevents the user from being stuck resending identical queries; it also allows the user to refine or clarify their intent if the AI failure suggests their original query may have been the issue.

→ Note: Pending your approval — say yes to apply to the product spec
